summary: Iteration 101: EchoAi³ Financial Operations Lifecycle. Backend: 28/28 tests PASSED (100%). Complete 7-step financial lifecycle working: PO→Approve→Submit→Receive→Invoice Match→GL Post→AP→Pay + Revenue posting.
critical_code_review_comments: Financial lifecycle runs 7 sequential steps correctly: po_approval → vendor_submission → receiving → invoice_matching → vendor_payments → revenue_posting → reconciliation
Reconciliation payment_reconciled=true confirms AP paid matches vendor payments (within $1 tolerance)
Stress test batch writes optimization working: 1,522-3,750 ops/sec achieved
Mega-stress with multiplier=5 completes in 0.052s (well under 2s requirement)
All 12 departments in ops-pulse verified: rooms, food_beverage, concierge, engineering, spa, financial, purchasing, inventory_depletion, banquets, commissary, approvals, receiving
seed_data_creation: Financial cycles create POs, receiving logs, 3-way matches, GL entries, AP entries, vendor payments in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 101 tested new Financial Operations Lifecycle. All endpoints working: POST /api/echoai3/financial-ops/run-full-cycle (7-step lifecycle), GET /api/echoai3/financial-ops/status (pipeline status), GET /api/echoai3/financial-ops/history (past cycles). Stress test optimization verified: 1,522-3,750 ops/sec with batch writes. Mega-stress completes in 0.052s. Ops-pulse still returns all 12 departments.

financial_ops_full_cycle: Step 1: po_approval - pending, approved, rejected counts - PASSED
Step 3: receiving - submitted_count, received, discrepancies - PASSED
Step 4: invoice_matching - processed, matched, gl_posted, exceptions - PASSED
Step 5: vendor_payments - outstanding, paid, total_paid - PASSED
Step 7: reconciliation - gl_revenue, gl_expense, gl_net, ap_outstanding, ap_paid, payment_reconciled - PASSED
Full cycle summary has all expected fields - PASSED
financial_ops_status: Status has pipeline stages: purchase_orders, receiving, matching, ap_aging, payments - PASSED
financial_ops_history: History lists past cycles with results - PASSED
stress_test_optimization: Batch writes confirmed: 270 ops in < 2s - PASSED
mega_stress: Returns EchoAi³ analysis with score, grade, health - PASSED
